descriptions: The Base is linked to the Russian accelerationist network Aast.
edges.evidence_quote: They are also linked to the Russian accelerationist network Aast.

descriptions: The PKK and DKP are both members of the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2016, the PKK helped to launch the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement with nine other Kurdish and Turkish revolutionary leftist, socialist and communist groups (including the TKP/ML , THKP-C/MLSPB , MKP , TKEP/L , TİKB , DKP

Real Irish Republican Army.description: Dissident Irish republican paramilitary group formed in 1997 after a split from the Provisional IRA, aiming to create a United Ireland. It waged a campaign in Northern Ireland against British security forces and was responsible for the 1998 Omagh bombing. In 2012, it largely merged into the New IRA, though small pockets remain active.

descriptions: The Hutch gang is allied with the Real Irish Republican Army.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Keane-Collopy Gang , McCarthy-Dundon Gang , RIRA , New IRA

descriptions: The Real IRA is listed as a rival of the Kinahan Organised Crime Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Real IRA

descriptions: New IRA is a continuation of Real IRA after merger with RAAD.
edges.evidence_quote: It is a continuation of the Real Irish Republican Army (Real IRA), which began to be called the 'New IRA' in July 2012 when Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups merged with it.

descriptions: The Real IRA is a splinter group that split from the Provisional IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: Several splinter groups have been formed as a result of splits within the IRA, including the Continuity IRA , which is still active in the dissident Irish republican campaign , and the Real IRA .

descriptions: The Real IRA splintered from the Provisional IRA in 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: The Real IRA was formed in November 1997 when senior Provisional IRA members, including quartermaster-general Michael McKevitt, resigned over acceptance of the Mitchell Principles.

descriptions: The 32 County Sovereignty Movement is the political wing of the Real IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: Bernadette Sands McKevitt, sister of hunger striker Bobby Sands and a founder of the RIRA's political wing, the 32 County Sovereignty Movement

descriptions: The Real IRA and Continuity IRA have cooperated locally.
edges.evidence_quote: The RIRA is distinct from the Continuity IRA, another Provisional IRA splinter group founded in 1986, although the two groups have been known to co-operate at a local level.

descriptions: The Real IRA merged with other groups to form the New IRA in 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: RAAD, "the IRA", and some smaller groups merged with the Real IRA in 2012 to form the New IRA.

descriptions: The Real IRA merged with other groups to form the New IRA in July 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: In July 2012, it was reported that Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups were merging with the Real IRA. This new entity was named the New IRA by the media

descriptions: The Real IRA merged into the New IRA in 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 July 2012, it was reported that Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups were merging with the Real IRA. As before, the group would continue to refer to itself as 'the Irish Republican Army', though some media began to refer to the group as a 'new IRA'.

descriptions: The Provisional IRA was hostile to the Real IRA, allegedly killing a member.
edges.evidence_quote: The Provisional IRA has been hostile to the RIRA and issued threats to RIRA members, and in October 2000 was alleged to be responsible for the fatal shooting of Belfast RIRA member Joe O'Connor according to O'Connor's family and 32 County Sovereignty Movement member Marian Price.

descriptions: The Real IRA split from the Provisional IRA in 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: It was formed in 1997 following a split in the Provisional IRA by dissident members, who rejected the IRA's ceasefire that year.

descriptions: The Real IRA merged with Republican Action Against Drugs in 2012 to form the New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: RAAD, "the IRA", and some smaller groups merged with the Real IRA in 2012 to form the New IRA.

descriptions: RAAD merged with the Real IRA in July 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: In July 2012, it was reported that Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups were merging with the Real IRA.

descriptions: RAAD merged with the Real IRA in 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 July 2012, it was reported that Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups were merging with the Real IRA.

Camorra.description: The Camorra is an Italian Mafia-type criminal organization originating in Campania, dating to the 18th century. It is structured into individual clans, each led by a boss, and is involved in drug trafficking, racketeering, counterfeiting, and money laundering. The organization has a strong presence in other European countries, particularly Spain, and maintains close ties with South American drug cartels. Currently, the most powerful groups are the Mazzarella clan and the Secondigliano Alliance.

descriptions: The 'Ndrangheta established contacts with the Camorra through cigarette smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: Their involvement in cigarette smuggling expanded their reach and facilitated contacts with the Sicilian Mafia and the Neapolitan Camorra.

descriptions: 'Ndrangheta has relationships with all Italian mafias, including Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto e ha rapporti con tutte le mafie italiane : Cosa nostra , Camorra , Banda della Magliana , Sacra Corona Unita , Basilischi .

descriptions: The text mentions Camorra only to clarify that cammorista is a rank within 'Ndrangheta, not to indicate a relationship between the two organizations.
edges.evidence_quote: Cammoristi are granted command over their own group of soldiers. Above the 'ndrina level, but still within the 'Ndrangheta structure, is the rank of santista, followed by vangelista. Aspiring vangelisti are required to swear an oath of dedication to a life of crime upon the Bible. The quintino, also referred to as padrino, represents the second-highest level of command within an 'Ndrangheta clan (Ndrina). This level comprises five privileged members who report directly to the boss, known as the capobastone (head of command).

descriptions: The text groups Sicilian Mafia, 'Ndrangheta, and Camorra as major Italian criminal organizations structured around families.
edges.evidence_quote: In addition to the traditional families of the Sicilian Mafia, other major Italian criminal organizations—particularly the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria and the Camorra in Campania, are also structured around criminal families.

descriptions: The text compares revenues of Italian mafias but does not assert a relationship between 'Ndrangheta and Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 35% è appannaggio della Camorra , il 33% della 'Ndrangheta, il 18% di Cosa nostra e l'11% della Sacra Corona Unita .

descriptions: The text lists them together as traditional secular organizations, but no specific relationship is asserted.
edges.evidence_quote: infatti le organizzazioni di tradizione secolare sono la 'ndrangheta , Cosa nostra , e la camorra

descriptions: Listed together as traditional mafia organizations, but no specific relationship stated.
edges.evidence_quote: le organizzazioni di tradizione secolare sono la 'ndrangheta , Cosa nostra , e la camorra

descriptions: Bellocco is allied with the Camorra according to the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Camorra

descriptions: Bellocco and Camorra were both involved in the same illegal betting operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: 14 novembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione Galassia ... in cui il presunto membro dei Pesce-Bellocco Antonio Zungri, alcuni membri dei Tegano e forse dei Piromalli insieme a camorristi e a criminali pugliesi (clan Capriati e Parisi) si erano inseriti illegalmente nella rete commerciale delle società di scommesse online

descriptions: The Bruzzaniti (as part of Morabito-Bruzzaniti-Palamara) trafficked drugs with the Casalesi Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoltre trafficavano in droga con la cosca camorrista dei casalesi .

descriptions: Morabito was involved in trafficking with the Camorra's Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: These clans were also involved in trafficking with the Camorra 's Casalesi clan.

descriptions: The Morabito (as part of Morabito-Bruzzaniti-Palamara) trafficked drugs with the Casalesi Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoltre trafficavano in droga con la cosca camorrista dei casalesi .

descriptions: The Palamara (as part of Morabito-Bruzzaniti-Palamara) trafficked drugs with the Casalesi Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoltre trafficavano in droga con la cosca camorrista dei casalesi .

descriptions: Palamara, Morabito, and Bruzzaniti trafficked drugs with the Casalesi Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Inoltre trafficavano in droga con la cosca camorristica dei casalesi .

descriptions: Pesce-Bellocco cooperated with Camorra in illegal online betting.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 novembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione "Galassia" ... in cui il presunto membro dei Pesce- Bellocco Antonio Zungri, alcuni membri dei Tegano e forse dei Piromalli insieme a camorristi e a criminali pugliesi (clan Capriati e Parisi) si erano inseriti illegalmente nella rete commerciale delle società di scommesse online

descriptions: The De Stefano 'ndrina was allied with a boss of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Era alleato con i boss delle altre organizzazioni criminali italiane, come Leoluca Bagarella e Nitto Santapaola della mafia siciliana, e Raffaele Cutolo della camorra.

descriptions: Morello fought the Camorra in the Mafia-Camorra War.
edges.evidence_quote: The fight over Gallucci's rackets became known as the Mafia-Camorra War.

descriptions: Camorra has greater affinity with Albanian crime families than with other Eastern European groups.
edges.evidence_quote: Saviano notes that the Camorra form greater affinity with the Albanian crime families than with other criminal groups from Eastern Europe.

descriptions: Albanian mafia is allied with Camorra.
time_periods: tra la fine del XX secolo e l'inizio del XXI secolo

descriptions: The American Mafia cooperates with the Camorra in criminal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Today, the Italian-American Mafia cooperates in various criminal activities with Italian organized crime groups, such as the Sicilian Mafia, the Camorra of Campania and the 'Ndrangheta of Calabria.

descriptions: The American Mafia cooperates in criminal activities with the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Today, the Italian-American Mafia cooperates in various criminal activities with Italian organized crime groups, such as the Sicilian Mafia, the Camorra of Campania and the 'Ndrangheta of Calabria.

descriptions: The American Mafia is allied with the Camorra.

descriptions: The American Mafia has links with the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The American Mafia , in addition to having links with organized crime groups in Italy such as the Camorra , the 'Ndrangheta , Sacra Corona Unita and Sicilian Mafia

descriptions: The American Mafia cooperates with the Camorra in criminal activities.

descriptions: American Mafia cooperates with Camorra in criminal activities.

descriptions: The American Mafia is allied with the Camorra.

descriptions: The American Mafia absorbed or merged with the American Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: finalmente absorbió o se fusionó con otros grupos criminales o de gánsters de origen italiano formados en los Estados Unidos (como los miembros de la Camorra estadounidense)

descriptions: A member of the Baltimore Crew murdered a reputed Camorra member.

descriptions: The Italian government claimed the Banda della Magliana was closely allied with Camorra.

descriptions: Cali Cartel allied with Camorra for cocaine distribution in Europe.

descriptions: The Camorra and 'Ndrangheta were involved together in an international drug network.

descriptions: Camorra and 'Ndrangheta have alliances.

descriptions: Camorra allegedly provided safe houses, forged documents, firearms, and explosives to Al-Qaeda in exchange for narcotics.

descriptions: Camorra clans have contacts with Albanian mafia.

descriptions: The New Organized Camorra was an attempt to unify Camorra families, thus a faction within the Camorra.

descriptions: Nuova Camorra Organizzata is a Camorra organization, part of the Camorra.

edges.evidence_quote: The 2009 film Fortapàsc (English: Fort Apache Napoli ) directed by Marco Risi about the brief life and death of journalist Giancarlo Siani , murdered by camorrisiti from the Nuvoletta clan .

descriptions: Nuvoletta clan is a constituent clan of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Examples include the Nuvoletta clan, from Marano di Napoli, named after the Nuvoletta brothers: Lorenzo, Angelo and Ciro;

descriptions: Camorra cooperates with Nigerian mafia in drug trafficking and prostitution.
edges.evidence_quote: I rapporti tra camorra e mafia nigeriana riguardano soprattutto il traffico di droga e la prostituzione.

descriptions: The Polverino clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Polverino clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: The Puca clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: The Camorra gave stewardship of Castel Volturno to the Rapaces, a Nigerian criminal group.
edges.evidence_quote: The first town in which the Camorra sanctioned stewardship by a foreign clan was Castel Volturno, which was given to the Rapaces, clans from Lagos and Benin City in Nigeria.

descriptions: Rinaldi clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Salvatore Nurcaro, a well known member of the Rinaldi clan

descriptions: Clan Rinaldi is a Camorra clan involved in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra gli arrestati nell'operazione c'era Salvatore Nurcaro, noto esponente del clan Rinaldi.

descriptions: Camorra and Russian Mafia cooperated in counterfeiting scheme in 1995.
edges.evidence_quote: the Camorra cooperated with the Russian Mafia in a scheme in which the Camorra would bleach out US$1 bills and reprint them as $100s.

descriptions: The Scissionisti di Secondigliano is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: Scissionisti di Secondigliano is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the Albanian mafia has alliances with the Mazzarella clan and with the Scissionisti di Secondigliano

descriptions: Scissionisti di Secondigliano is a Camorra clan in contact with Albanian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Dalla seconda relazione semestrale del 2010 della DIA vengono illustrati contatti tra la mafia albanese e il clan Mazzarella, con gli Scissionisti di Secondigliano e il clan Serino di Sarno.

descriptions: The Secondigliano Alliance is a powerful group within the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: the most powerful groups of the Camorra in the present day are the Mazzarella clan and the Secondigliano Alliance

descriptions: Secondigliano Alliance is a Camorra clan, part of the Camorra organization.
edges.evidence_quote: According to numerous 2019 reports, the most powerful clans of the Camorra are the Secondigliano Alliance and the Mazzarella clan .

descriptions: Camorra and Cosa Nostra had both cooperation (conversion of routes) and conflict (war).
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1970s, the Sicilian Mafia convinced the Camorra to convert their cigarette smuggling routes into drug smuggling routes. Yet not all Camorra leaders agreed, sparking a war between the two factions and resulting in the murder of almost 400 men.

descriptions: The Camorra and Sicilian Mafia jointly operated a money laundering scheme.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1993, the Camorra and the Sicilian Mafia were accused of running a $1.5 billion operation to launder drug money through banks, insurance companies, hotels and casinos in Italy and on the French Riviera , arresting 36 suspects.

descriptions: Camorra clans have lasting relationships with Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: Several Camorra clans have lasting relationships with the Cosa Nostra.

descriptions: Cosa Nostra convinced Camorra to cooperate on drug smuggling routes.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1970s, the Sicilian Mafia convinced the Camorra to convert their cigarette smuggling routes into drug smuggling routes.

descriptions: Cosa Nostra members in Campania strengthened operational ties with Camorra clans.
edges.evidence_quote: Il soggiorno obbligato di esponenti di Cosa nostra in Campania consolidò legami operativi con camorristi napoletani e casertani, tra cui Zaza, Nuvoletta e Bardellino.

descriptions: Camorra clans cooperated with Sicilian mafiosi (Cosa Nostra) to defeat the Marseille clan.
edges.evidence_quote: i clan camorristici, in combutta con i mafiosi siciliani, riuscirono a sbaragliare la concorrenza straniera del clan dei marsigliesi

descriptions: Camorra clans have links with South American drug cartels since the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: The links between the South American drug cartels and Camorra clans dates back to at least the 1980s

descriptions: Tamarisco clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the Tamarisco clan from Torre Annunziata

descriptions: Camorra and Chinese Triads cooperate in human trafficking, drug trafficking, and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: there is a close relationship between the Triads and the Camorra, and the port of Naples is the most important landing point of the trades managed by the Chinese groups in cooperation with the Camorra.

descriptions: Camorra cooperates with Triads in human trafficking, drug trafficking, and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: esiste una stretta relazione tra le triadi e la Camorra e il porto di Napoli è il punto di approdo più importante delle attività gestite dai gruppi cinesi in cooperazione con la camorra.

descriptions: Camorra and Ukrainian mafia cooperated in cigarette smuggling in the 2000s.
edges.evidence_quote: the Ukrainian mafia cooperated with Camorra clans in the cigarette smuggling business.

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a Camorra clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Antonio Bardellino ... was a powerful Camorrista and boss of the Casalesi clan

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a constituent part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Casalesi clan is a clan within the Camorra

descriptions: The Camorra Casalesi clan is a sub-group of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra Casalesi clan rose in the 1980s, gaining control of large areas of the local economy

descriptions: The Casalesi clan is a clan within the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Spartacus Trial ... was a series of criminal trials, each specifically directed against the activities of the powerful Casalesi clan of the Camorra.

descriptions: Camorra families are now rivals stifling Casamonica clan's power.
edges.evidence_quote: But their mafia power is now also being stifled by the rival 'ndrine and Camorra families

descriptions: Camorra provides drugs and protection to Casamonica clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The various families allied of the Camorra and 'Ndrangheta provide it with drugs to sell and protection to operate in its own territory of competence

descriptions: The Casamonica clan inherited contacts with Camorra from the Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: With the dismantling of the Banda della Magliana, the Clan increased its criminal power by inheriting its criminal dealings and contacts with Camorra and 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: The Ercolano faction of the Catania family operated in tandem with Camorra groups.
edges.evidence_quote: often operating in tandem with powerful Camorra groups.

descriptions: Cappello entered into business with the Camorra of Carmine Alfieri.
edges.evidence_quote: Cappello era entrato in affari con la camorra di Carmine Alfieri

descriptions: The Casamonica clan was part of a criminal organization that included Camorra members.
edges.evidence_quote: L'11 maggio 2016 viene sgominata a Roma una organizzazione criminale tra elementi criminali di etnia rom abruzzese, il clan dei Casamonica, esponenti della camorra e delle 'ndrine di Polistena, Taurianova e del locale di Melicucco.

descriptions: The Fabbrocino clan is a part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Mario Fabbrocino was a powerful Italian crime boss of the Camorra – the Neapolitan mafia.

descriptions: The Loreto-Matrone clan is a part of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Matrone was at the head of the Loreto-Matrone clan of the Camorra

descriptions: Moretti-Pellegrino-Lanza maintains ties with Neapolitan Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: i Moretti-Pellegrino-Lanza, diretta emanazione del gruppo di Giosuè Rizzi che continuano a mantenere legami con la camorra napoletana

descriptions: The clan is linked to the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Vangone-Limelli è un sodalizio criminale legato alla camorra

descriptions: Lorenzo Nuvoletta, a Camorra boss, was an associate of Leggio and his clan was also a branch of Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: Lorenzo Nuvoletta , who was the head of a mafia family operating in the Naples area, as a Camorra clan, but which was also a local branch of Cosa Nostra

descriptions: The Corsican mafia lists the Camorra as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: American Mafia, Camorra, Lebanese mafia, Milieu, 'Ndrangheta, Sicilian Mafia

descriptions: D'Aquila fought against the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1916 the Camorra had assassinated Nicholas Morello, head of the Morello gang. In response, D'Aquila allied with the Morellos to fight the Camorra.

descriptions: De Stefano had joint ventures with Camorra boss Cutolo.
edges.evidence_quote: the De Stefanos were the representation of the manager-criminal controlling a crime multinational with joint ventures with Raffaele Cutolo from the Camorra

descriptions: Di Lauro clan is a constituent part of the Camorra.

descriptions: The Galician Mafia is allied with Camorra.

descriptions: The Gambino family's predecessor (D'Aquila's family) expanded after the Camorra's disappearance, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1917 tra rivalità, omicidi e condanne, la presenza della Camorra nella città scompare e le famiglie di D'Aquila e di Nicola Schirò ne approfittano per estendere la loro influenza nel quartiere di Brooklyn.

descriptions: Greek organized crime is compared to the Camorra, but no direct relationship is asserted.
edges.evidence_quote: For this reason, it is often compared to the Italian Camorra , which at times has operated via a similar model, although Greek organised crime relies mainly on smuggling whereas the Italian Camorra relies mainly on extortion and racketeering.

edges.evidence_quote: This conflict was between the Sicilian Morello-Terranova family and Brooklyn Camorra gangs led by Pellegrino Morano .

descriptions: Morello family defeated the Camorra in the Mafia–Camorra War.
edges.evidence_quote: The Morellos were based in Manhattan 's Italian Harlem and eventually gained dominance in the Italian underworld by defeating the rival Neapolitan Camorra of Brooklyn .

descriptions: NCO fought a war with other Camorra clans for control of illegal activities.

edges.evidence_quote: Cutolo si ispirò, inizialmente, ai rituali della Bella Società Riformata

descriptions: Camorra members operate as associates of Nuova Mala del Brenta.
edges.evidence_quote: Its members are exclusively native to the Veneto region, but with a number of associates operating in the region from Cosa Nostra, Camorra and it is believed from the Ndrangheta as well.

descriptions: Nigerian mafia is allied with Camorra in prostitution, drugs, and human trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the police, the Nigerians are increasing their alliances with the Neapolitan Camorra and the Sicilian Mafia , the alliances are most regarded to prostitution, drugs and human trafficking business.

descriptions: Nigerian mafia pays tribute to Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Nigerian mafia pays tribute (a percentage of its profits from criminal rackets) to the Camorra and Sicilian Mafia.

descriptions: Nigerian mafia is in business with Camorra.

descriptions: Remo Lecce Libera opposed Neapolitan Camorra penetration in Salento.
edges.evidence_quote: La Remo Lecce Libera richiedeva infatti l'indipendenza dei criminali leccesi da qualsiasi organizzazione criminale che non fosse la 'Ndrangheta ma venne stroncata sul nascere dalla Sacra Corona Unita, che minacciò pesantemente di uccidere i suoi affiliati, come infatti avvenne con l'omicidio di Donato Erpete nel 1989.

descriptions: The Renzvillo family formed alliances with Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Renzvillo mafia family has allegedly set up alliances with the 'Ndrangheta and Camorra.

descriptions: Camorra and Russian mafia cooperated in a counterfeiting scheme.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1995, the Camorra cooperated with the Russian mafia in a scheme in which the Camorra would bleach out US$1 bills and reprint them as $100s.

descriptions: SCU originally operated under Camorra influence but later became independent.
edges.evidence_quote: A few years after the creation of the SCU, following the downfall of Cutolo, the organization began to operate independently from the Camorra under the leadership of Giuseppe Rogoli.

descriptions: Bontade of the Santa Maria di Gesù Family cooperated with the Camorra clan Maisto.
edges.evidence_quote: Bontade, for instance, linked up with Giuseppe Sciorio of the Maisto clan of the Camorra, who would be initiated in Cosa Nostra.

descriptions: Camorra members were admitted into Cosa Nostra and formed branches in Campania.
edges.evidence_quote: Nei primi anni settanta le organizzazioni di contrabbandieri siciliani si legarono a quelle napoletane per sbaragliare la concorrenza marsigliese nel traffico di sigarette estere e di eroina dall'Est Europa. Come "premio", i camorristi campani furono ammessi in Cosa nostra e formarono delle succursali in Campania

descriptions: Camorra clans have had relationships with Cosa Nostra, mainly in cigarette smuggling and drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Vari clan di Camorra hanno intrattenuto rapporti, più o meno duraturi, con Cosa nostra, soprattutto nel campo del contrabbando di sigarette e del traffico di stupefacenti.

descriptions: Camorra collaborated with Cosa Nostra and other groups under Russian mafia supervision.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2008 viene formalizzata la collaborazione fra mafia russa e Cosa nostra, 'ndrangheta e camorra.

descriptions: The text groups Sicilian Mafia, 'Ndrangheta, and Camorra as major Italian criminal organizations structured around families.
edges.evidence_quote: In addition to the traditional families of the Sicilian Mafia, other major Italian criminal organizations—particularly the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria and the Camorra in Campania, are also structured around criminal families.

descriptions: Both groups are involved in heroin trafficking, but no direct cooperation is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Italian organized crime groups, in particular the Sicilian Mafia and the Camorra, have been involved in heroin trafficking for decades.

descriptions: The text compares Cosa Nostra and Camorra as distinct Italian mafia organizations.
edges.evidence_quote: Inizialmente, con il termine Mafia spesso ci si riferiva a Cosa Nostra , anche se storicamente si ritiene che la prima organizzazione mafiosa italiana sia la Camorra .

descriptions: The text lists them together as traditional secular organizations, but no specific relationship is asserted.
edges.evidence_quote: infatti le organizzazioni di tradizione secolare sono la 'ndrangheta , Cosa nostra , e la camorra

descriptions: Listed together as traditional mafia organizations, but no specific relationship stated.
edges.evidence_quote: le organizzazioni di tradizione secolare sono la 'ndrangheta , Cosa nostra , e la camorra

descriptions: Società foggiana broke ties with Camorra after initial subordination.
edges.evidence_quote: nel giro di pochi anni tuttavia l'organizzazione criminale foggiana si libera dei vincoli con la camorra

descriptions: Società Foggiana has deep relations with Camorra, especially NCO.
edges.evidence_quote: The relations between the Foggia delinquency and the Camorra are probably the oldest and deepest ones. The Foggia delinquency has managed to make the qualitative leap thanks to the Camorra, particularly the Nuova Camorra Organizzata ;

descriptions: Società Foggiana has deep relations with Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The relations between the Foggia delinquency and the Camorra are probably the oldest and deepest ones.

descriptions: Società foggiana has agreements with Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: ha trovato accordi con organizzazioni criminali come la mafia siciliana , la camorra e la 'ndrangheta

descriptions: Long-standing and deep ties between Società foggiana and Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: I rapporti tra camorra e delinquenza foggiana sono, probabilmente, quelli di più antica data e quelli più profondi.

descriptions: Infobox lists Camorra as an ally of Sun Yee On.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wo Hop To, Wo On Lok, Albanian mafia, Camorra, Serbian mafia, American Mafia, Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: Taghi organisation and Camorra are described as part of a super drug cartel together.
edges.evidence_quote: Documents produced by the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) of the United States, and sent to the Dutch police, exposed what appeared to be a super drug cartel headed by Ridouan Taghi, alongside Raffaele Imperiale (Camorra's drugs and arms dealer), Daniel Kinahan (Irish reputed gang boss) and Edin Gačanin (Bosnian drug trafficker).

descriptions: Triad and Camorra have a close relationship and cooperate in illegal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the expert on terrorist organizations and mafia-type organized crime Antonio De Bonis, there is a close relationship between the Triad and the Camorra and the Port of Naples is the most important landing point for the activities managed by the Chinese groups in cooperation with the camorra.

descriptions: Triads and Camorra cooperate in human trafficking, drug trafficking, and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: there is a close relationship between the Triads and the Camorra

descriptions: The Turatello Crew was allied with the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (Camorra).
edges.evidence_quote: As the leader of the so-called Turatello Crew, Francis Turatello was a protégé of the Sicilian Mafia and an important ally in Milan, for both the Sicilian Mafia and Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

descriptions: Ukrainian mafia cooperated with Camorra in cigarette smuggling.

edges.evidence_quote: This method had been used in New York City by Neapolitan Camorristi , Sicilian mafiosi , and other Italian immigrant criminal gangs who preyed on fellow Italian immigrants as the Black Hand .

descriptions: Zemun clan member worked for Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Zemun clan member Ninoslav Konstantinović fled the Netherlands to Italy after his brother was arrested in 2003. In Italy he became a leading heroin distributor and professional hitman, working for the Camorra in Naples

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Mesiani Mazzacuva.

edges.evidence_quote: Ha insediamenti anche a Torino , in Liguria , Francia , Spagna e Canada e collegamenti con la criminalità pugliese

descriptions: The PKK and DK are both members of the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: In March 2016, the PKK helped to launch the Peoples' United Revolutionary Movement with nine other Kurdish and Turkish revolutionary leftist, socialist and communist groups (including the TKP/ML , THKP-C/MLSPB , MKP , TKEP/L , TİKB , DKP , DK

descriptions: F-side and Vak S are rivals.

White Aryan Resistance.description: White supremacist and neo-Nazi organization in the United States, founded in 1983 by Tom Metzger. Originally named White American Political Association, then White American Resistance, before adopting the name White Aryan Resistance in 1984. Based in Warsaw, Indiana, it published a newspaper and produced a cable TV show. The group is described as openly white-racist and revolutionary.

descriptions: Tension and disagreement arose between American Front and White Aryan Resistance after Aryan Woodstock.
edges.evidence_quote: Tension between AF and WAR increased soon after.

descriptions: American Front cooperated with White Aryan Resistance starting in 1988.
edges.evidence_quote: Heick began working with Tom Metzger's White Aryan Resistance (WAR) in 1988.

descriptions: A WAR sympathizer claimed bombings were by Aryan Liberation Front, but no direct relationship stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Calls were made in which it was stated that the bombings were perpetrated by an organization called the Aryan Liberation Front, of which Campos was the only member.

descriptions: East Side White Pride allegedly had ties to WAR.
edges.evidence_quote: three white Aryan supremacists who were members of East Side White Pride, which allegedly had ties to WAR

descriptions: WAR's founder and former leader was a former Klan Grand Dragon.
edges.evidence_quote: founded and formerly led by former Ku Klux Klan Grand Dragon Tom Metzger

descriptions: ISHP is an affiliate of Islamic State.
edges.evidence_quote: Islamic State – Hind Province (ISHP) is the Indian branch of IS and operates in Indian Jammu and Kashmir.

descriptions: Terracciano clan is a Camorra clan, part of the Camorra organization.
edges.evidence_quote: On 11 July 2019, Anna Terracciano, known as ‘a Masculona , boss of the Terracciano clan, died after suffering from an unknown illness.

descriptions: Clan Mariano (remnants) allied with Terracciano.
edges.evidence_quote: I superstiti del clan starebbero tentando di riorganizzarsi intorno al fratello dello storico capo dei Picuozzi, unendosi in alleanza con i clan degli Esposito, dei Lepre della zona del Cavone e degli Elia del Pallonetto di Santa Lucia, a questo sodalizio si sarebbe unito anche il clan di Salvatore Terracciano (detto o'Nirone) dei Quartieri Spagnoli, storico affiliato dei Picuozzi.

descriptions: Gitans MC and Atomes MC fought a turf war from 1973 to 1975.
edges.evidence_quote: Tensions between both groups eventually erupted in 1973, when a violent turf war commenced.

descriptions: After the war, Gitans and Atomes agreed to share the drug market.
edges.evidence_quote: both gangs reluctantly reached an agreement to share the city's drug market.

descriptions: Iannazzo lists Pagliuso as an ally.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan supports the D'Atri faction.
edges.evidence_quote: And through contacts with the local criminals, would have taken control of illicit affairs in the area, supporting the D'Atri faction, a small criminal group already inserted in the underworld of Somma Vesuviana.

descriptions: The Crazy Dragons sold guns to the Fresh Off the Boat gang.
edges.evidence_quote: During a gang war in Calgary between two Asian-Canadian gangs, the Fresh Off the Boat gang and the Fresh Off the Boat Killers, the Crazy Dragons served as gunrunners, selling guns to the Fresh Off the Boat gang.

descriptions: The Albanese are allied with the Raso-Gullace.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Raso-Gullace.

Sangre Nueva Zeta.description: Mexican criminal syndicate formed in 2019 by former members of Los Zetas, founded by Roberto de los Santos de Jesús. Based in Puebla, it originally focused on fuel theft but expanded into cocaine trafficking and extortion. Allied with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel, it is still active.

descriptions: Infobox states that Los Zetas splintered into factions including Sangre Nueva Zeta.
edges.evidence_quote: Estatus: Desarticulado, operan como facciones Cártel del Noreste , Zetas Vieja Escuela , Sangre Nueva Zeta, Los Talibanes (cártel ubicado en Zacatecas), Los Alemanes , Nueva Mafia Zeta.

descriptions: Sangre Nueva Zeta is a faction that emerged from the fragmentation of Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: Estatus: Desarticulado, operan como facciones ... Sangre Nueva Zeta

descriptions: Sangre Nueva Zeta is a splinter faction of Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: Estatus: Desarticulado, operan como facciones Cártel del Noreste, Zetas Vieja Escuela, Sangre Nueva Zeta, Los Talibanes (cártel ubicado en Zacatecas), Los Alemanes, Nueva Mafia Zeta.

descriptions: Sangre Nueva Zeta allied with Jalisco New Generation Cartel to expand.
edges.evidence_quote: Sangre Nueva Zeta then expanded thanks to its alliance with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel

descriptions: Sangre Nueva Zeta is composed of former Los Zetas members.
edges.evidence_quote: The organization is made up of former members of Los Zetas.

Jheri Curls.description: The Jheri Curls were a Dominican gang active in Washington Heights, Manhattan in the early 1990s. Led by Rafael Martinez and his brothers, they ran a major cocaine trafficking operation based out of an apartment complex. Known for extreme violence, they murdered a resident who cooperated with police. The gang was dismantled in 1991 after arrests and convictions.

descriptions: Devil Cobra MC Moosburg merged into Trust MC in 1984.
edges.evidence_quote: In early 1984 the MCs MC Ergoldsbach (founded 1982), the Devil Cobra MC Moosburg, the Free Fighters MC Erding, the Ranger MC Neutraubling and some members of the Destroyer MCs Landshut merged to form the Trust MC Germany.

descriptions: Increased tensions between NPK and Farm Mandem.

descriptions: NPK and OFB member SJ jointly involved in murder, indicating cooperation.

descriptions: SJ and others convicted of murder were linked to NPK; SJ is an OFB member.

descriptions: NPK and Shankstarz engaged in a fight.

descriptions: NPK is a split-off group from TMD.
edges.evidence_quote: NPK (Northumberland Park Killers), also known as Sin Squad, are a split-off group from TMD

descriptions: APC created self-defense forces in response to militarization of Yorubas by OPC, indicating conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: They are known for cooperating with the Red Wa (who are associated with the United Wa State Army) for the trafficking and sale of narcotics.

descriptions: The Maesano family was part of a broader criminal association that included the Pangallo family.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan nasce nella zona di Roghudi e Roccaforte del Greco , come parte di una più ampia associazione criminale formata dalle famiglie Maesano, Pangallo, Verno e Favasuli.

descriptions: A Bandidos prospect club member killed a Road Tramps member.
edges.evidence_quote: On 20 June 2015, Road Tramps member Andrew "Odd" O'Donoghue was shot dead by Alan "Cookie" McNamara, a member of the Caballeros – a Bandidos prospect club.

descriptions: Hells Angels disputed with Road Tramps over a motorcycle festival.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wolverhampton Hells Angels chapter became involved in a longrunning dispute with the Derby-based Road Tramps motorcycle gang over control of the 'Rock and Blues Custom show'.

descriptions: Spanish Cobras and Two Sixers cooperated to form SGD.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1989, leaders of the Spanish Cobras, the Maniac Latin Disciples, and the Two Sixers met to establish the Spanish Growth and Development (SGD), a structured organization.

descriptions: The Baybaşin family commands and supports the Hackney Bombers.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hackney Bombers, a Kurdish gang in the United Kingdom under the command of Hüseyin Baybaşin, came to prominence following clashes with the Turkish-controlled Tottenham Turks gang. The Hackney Bombers, armed and financially supported by the Baybaşins, attacked a restaurant owned by Tottenham Turks with a group of masked thugs on motorbikes and AK-47s.

descriptions: The Hackney Bombers clashed with the Tottenham Turks gang.
edges.evidence_quote: On 29 May 2024, the Hackney Bombers, a Kurdish gang in the United Kingdom under the command of Hüseyin Baybaşin, came to prominence following clashes with the Turkish-controlled Tottenham Turks gang.

descriptions: Dojin-kai and Kumamoto-kai are allies per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Kudo-kai, Sinaloa cartel, Taishu-kai, Kumamoto-kai)

descriptions: Kudo-kai and Kumamoto-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi fraternal federation, the Yonsha-kai, with three other northern-Kyushu based organizations, the Taishu-kai , Dojin-kai , and Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Taishu-kai and Kumamoto-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai", along with the Kitakyushu -based Kudo-kai , the Kurume -based Dojin-kai and the Kumamoto -based Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: MAPI agreed to cooperate with AFC-M23 (M23).
edges.evidence_quote: MAPI leaders opted for independence, they agreed to cooperate with ADCVI and AFC-M23

edges.evidence_quote: Robert 'Hoss' Hall, president of the Richmond, Virginia -based Confederate Angels Motorcycle Club
